text.title: Two-Layer Secret Scanning Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to deploy gitleaks + verified TruffleHog end-to-end.

step.name: check-prereqs
step.action: Verify pre-commit framework installable; CI has outbound egress.
step.decision-gate: If no egress AND no offline substitute accepted, STOP.

step.name: install-gitleaks-precommit
step.action: Add gitleaks hook to `.pre-commit-config.yaml` / `lefthook.yml` / `.husky/`; commit `gitleaks.toml` with org allowlist.

step.name: wire-trufflehog-ci
step.action: Add `trufflehog-action.yml` with `--results=verified` on pull_request + push; fail the job on any verified finding.

step.name: baseline-history
step.action: Run `detect-secrets scan --baseline .secrets.baseline`; commit baseline; ratchet out entries over time.
